MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Sets One And Two, And For Monetary Sanctions; P&A; Declaration

Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on THU-SEP-19-2013:
Ralph E. Laird, Esq. of Mackenroth & Laird [916.724.1755] appearing by telephone for plaintiff JUDITH FOY;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff JUDITH FOY'S Motion for Order Compelling Responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Requests for Production of Documents, Sets One and Two, and for Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, for the reasons set forth in the moving papers, i.e., defendant has failed to provide any responses to the at-issue discovery, has not responded to plaintiff's efforts to meet and confer, and has not opposed the motion. Defendant and its counsel are ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $510.00 within 15 days of service of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Sets One And Two, And For Monetary Sanctions; P&A; Declaration

Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Continued To Sep-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JUDITH FOY's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Sets One And Two, And For Monetary Sanctions is Continued to September 19, 2013 at 9 am to give Ms. Foy the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Ms. Foy must deliver courtesy copies of the moving/ papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 11, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
